details.test: Task 1: Add two cheapest beginner leadership courses under $100 to cart
Task 2: Request proposal for small-business consulting package (>=10 hours, < $1200)
Task 3: Create saved training plan with three top-rated in-person workshops
Task 4: Book earliest 60-minute 1:1 coaching session next week (morning)
Task 5: Save three technology case studies over $20k and under 6 months
Task 6: Subscribe weekly newsletter from third remote teams article
Task 7: Configure on-site 2-day training for 25 with coaching under $8,000
Task 8: Contact North America leadership consultant (10+ years, 5+ clients)
